mentions_legales.label: Adresse de courrier électronique
mentions_legales.quote: You may also contact Uber's Data Protection Officer at uber.com/privacy-dpo

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: # Uber Privacy Notice: Riders and Order Recipients

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Uber Technologies, Inc. is the sole controller of the data processed by Uber when you use Uber’s services globally, except where it is a joint controller with other Uber affiliates.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may also contact Uber's Data Protection Officer at uber.com/privacy-dpo, or by mail to Uber B.V. (Burgerweeshuispad 301, 1076 HR Amsterdam, the Netherlands) regarding issues relating to Uber's processing of your personal data and your data protection rights.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Data category | Data types |
|---|---|
| a.  | AddressContact info (*i.e.*, email or phone number)First and last nameLogin name and passwordPhone numberPayment method (including related payment verification information)Profile photoSettings (including accessibility settings) and preferencesUber partner loyalty program information

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Legal basis | Description | Data uses |
|---|---|---|
| Contract | When you set up your Uber account and/or request a ride or delivery from Uber, we are entering into a contract defined by our terms and conditions to provide you those services. This legal basis applies when we must use your data in order to provide the services you request and meet our responsibilities under that contract.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We collect your date of birth and/or age to verify your eligibility to use age-restricted products or services, such as Uber for teens, or if you purchase alcohol, tobacco or cannabis products.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Data Category | Retention Period |
|---|---|
| Account | Life of account |

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Recipient | Data shared |
|---|---|
| Drivers or delivery people | Account First nameRating Pickup and/or dropoff locationsSettings (including accessibility settings) and preferences

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Uber uses automated processes to enable certain parts of our products and services, including functions essential for service delivery and user safety such as matching, pricing and fraud prevention and detection.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Securing user data when in transit, including through encryption, and at rest.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Data category | Data types |
|---|---|
| b.  | Usage data, including your engagement with marketing and advertising campaignsContactDeviceEnrichment data such as demographics (age range, household income range, gender), general interests and lifestyle, general purchasing behavior, viewing preferences and streaming habits.*

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Data from other sources: These include:

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You have the right to contact the data protection authority (“DPA”) in your country via the contact information listed here if you have concerns regarding our handling of your data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can edit your name, phone number, email address, payment method, and profile photo through the Settings menu in Uber’s apps.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Regardless of your location, you can access your data, including your profile data and trip or order history, through the Uber apps or website.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may request that we delete your account through the Privacy menus in the Uber app, or through Uber’s website (Riders and Order Recipients here; Guest Users here).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may request that we stop using all or some of your data, or that we limit our use of your data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can also use our Download Your Data feature to download a copy of the most requested data relating to use of Uber, including account, usage, communications, and device data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may request that we stop using all or some of your data, or that we limit our use of your data. This includes objecting to our use of data that is based on Uber’s legitimate interests.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Last updated: July 13, 2026**

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: For information on how to control Uber’s use of cookies and related technologies, including for purposes of displaying personalized ads, please see our Cookie Notice.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Uber Technologies, Inc. is the sole controller of the data processed by Uber when you use Uber’s services globally, except where it is a joint controller with other Uber affiliates.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: Uber uses data (except Guest Users’ data) to market its services, and those of Uber partners.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: - Ad intermediaries, such as Criteo, Google, Rokt, The Trade Desk, TripleLift and others.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote:
| Data uses | Data used includes |
|---|---|
| Use your personal data to understand your interests, preferences, or characteristics about you, and personalize ads we show you. | AccountData from other sourcesDemographics (including inferred gender)DeviceLocationTrip/orderUsage

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote:
| Data category | Data types |
|---|---|
| d.  | Advertising identifiersBrowser typeDevice motion dataDevice IP address or other unique device identifiersHardware modelsMobile network dataOperating systems and versionsPreferred languages

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: This may result in processing of your personal data in countries, including the United States, whose data protection laws may differ from those where you live or are located.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Uber’s servers in the United States
